creator: jyrki.k@post.cz
text:
I can a report of 7 APs available, required silinet_54 is amond them
unfortunately status is "no carrier". The same configuration works
perfectly on 6.2-RELEASE and also on all older releases.

Find attached dmesg -a rep:
